title: Acompáñame
writer: Jesús María de Arozamena, Rafael J. Salvia, Luis César Amadori
actors: Rocío Dúrcal, Enrique Guzmán, Amalia de Isaura
plot: Eduvigis is an Eldery Lady who lives in Madrid, and visits bad luck on everyone that she looks at through glasses that her late husband gave her, which were made from crystals from an Egyptian Tomb. To arrange the sale of an inher...
